Klasse Population<T>

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.Population<T>
Typparameter:
T - the type of the genes used in the individuals' chromosomes
public class Population<T> extends Object
Represents a population of individuals in a genetic algorithm. A population is essentially a collection of individuals and provides utility methods for fitness aggregation and retrieving the fittest individual.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Population()
    Creates an empty population.
    Population(List<Individual<T>> individuals)
    Creates a population containing the given individuals.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    addIndividual(Individual<T> individual)
    Adds an individual to the population.
    Individual<T>
    getFittestIndividual()
    Returns the individual with the highest fitness value.
    Individual<T>
    getIndividual(int index)
    Returns the individual at the specified index.
    List<Individual<T>>
    getIndividuals()
    Returns all individuals in this population.
    int
    getTotalFitness()
    Computes the sum of all fitness values in the population.
    int
    size()
    Returns the number of individuals in the population.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Population

      public Population()
      Creates an empty population.

    • Population

      public Population(List<Individual<T>> individuals)
      Creates a population containing the given individuals.
      Parameter:
      individuals - the individuals to include

  • Methodendetails

    • getIndividuals

      public List<Individual<T>> getIndividuals()
      Returns all individuals in this population.
      Gibt zurück:
      the list of individuals

    • getIndividual

      public Individual<T> getIndividual(int index)
      Returns the individual at the specified index.
      Parameter:
      index - the index of the individual
      Gibt zurück:
      the individual at the given index

    • addIndividual

      public void addIndividual(Individual<T> individual)
      Adds an individual to the population.
      Parameter:
      individual - the individual to add

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the number of individuals in the population.
      Gibt zurück:
      the population size

    • getFittestIndividual

      public Individual<T> getFittestIndividual()
      Returns the individual with the highest fitness value. Individuals without a fitness value (null) are ignored.
      Gibt zurück:
      the fittest individual, or null if none have been evaluated

    • getTotalFitness

      public int getTotalFitness()
      Computes the sum of all fitness values in the population. Individuals without a fitness value are treated as having fitness 0.
      Gibt zurück:
      the total fitness of the population
